ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "roll_number" INTEGER /* Roll number of the candidate */,
  "application_number" TEXT /* Application number of the candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "father_name" TEXT /* Father's name of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the candidate */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the candidate */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the candidate */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the candidate */,
  "pincode" TEXT /* Pincode of the candidate */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "examination_types" (
  "examination_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each examination type */,
  "examination_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the examination type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the examination type */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the examination in minutes */,
  "max_marks" INTEGER /* Maximum marks for the examination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("examination_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "examination_schedules" (
  "examination_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each examination schedule */,
  "examination_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the examination type */,
  "examination_date" TEXT /* Date of the examination */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the examination */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the examination */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the examination */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number for the examination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("examination_schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_examination_schedules" (
  "candidate_examination_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate examination schedule */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "examination_schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the examination schedule */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status of the candidate (Present/Absent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_examination_schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_examination_schedules_examination_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("examination_schedule_id") REFERENCES examination_schedules ("examination_schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_examination_schedules_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "examination_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the examination type */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., Qualified, Not Qualified, Absent) */,
  "marks" REAL /* Marks obtained by the candidate */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_examination_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("examination_type_id") REFERENCES examination_types ("examination_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff, student) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_categories" (
  "candidate_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate category */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_categories_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_categories_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategory ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "examination_type_results" (
  "examination_type_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each examination type result */,
  "examination_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the examination type */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result */,
  "passing_marks" INTEGER /* Passing marks for the examination type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("examination_type_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_examination_type_results_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_examination_type_results_examination_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("examination_type_id") REFERENCES examination_types ("examination_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., Unread, Read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategory" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)
